title: Variable Hour Daily Booking Planning System - Like a Calendar
excerpt:

posts.author: Kofi (Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone have any ideas on setting a booking and planning system where users can plan and book slots during the day that vary in time and hour.

We are using an app that allows user to create slots in a Calendar, in a similar to way to Microsoft Outlook and Google Calendar.

We would like to do this in monday, and also be able to assign a person and project to each entry.

Each entry can be 15 minutes to several hours, and ideally have an interface where we can items can be created in a Calendar view.

I understand monday has limitations for this:

  • Unable to have varying length of items in calendar view
  • Unable to sync item start and finish times of an item into calendar view

If you have a working solution I would love to know how you did it.

Thanks

Kofi

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kofi,

I imagine there are many ways to go about this! Would using Google Calendar’s Appointments functionality help? These appointments can be synced back to monday. I’ve written a solution page that uses our app Calendar Plus to show the appointments with start and end time, but you can mix and match components

–
